title: Gradient Flow in a Deep Neural Network
description: A directed graph showing the propagation of gradients from the loss function back through the layers of a deep neural network, illustrating the chain rule of calculus.
relationships: Forward pass: X -> h1 -> h2 -> ŷ -> L
Backward pass: L -> dL/dW3 -> dL/dW2 -> dL/dW1
Each gradient is calculated using the chain rule: dL/dW = (dL/dŷ) * (dŷ/dh) * (dh/dW)
